query: SELECT id, venue, customerName, eventType, status, createdAt FROM event_orders WHERE venue LIKE '%Leela%' OR customerName LIKE '%Leela%'; SELECT id, title, workshopDate, status FROM workshops ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
